zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen於大約1232年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾時，她的父親Rhys ap Llywelyn34歲，母親Mrs. Rhys ap Llywelyn30歲。她於大約1256年與Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利 安德 普爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年在威爾士享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen于大约1232年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾时，她的父亲Rhys ap Llywelyn34岁，母亲Mrs. Rhys ap Llywelyn30岁。她于大约1256年与Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利 安德 普爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1285年在威尔士享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen was born about 1232, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Rhys ap Llywelyn, was 34 and her mother, Mrs. Rhys ap Llywelyn, was 30. She married Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin about 1256, in Montgomery and Pool, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1285, in Wales, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen est née environ 1232, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rhys ap Llywelyn, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Rhys ap Llywelyn, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin environ 1256, à Montgomery and Pool, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1285, à Galles, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen(이)가 대략 1232년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys ap Llywelyn(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Rhys ap Llywelyn(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1256년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리 앤드 포에서 Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 웨일스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Montgomery, Wales: монтгомири анд пул, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen родилась около 1232 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Rhys ap Llywelyn было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Rhys ap Llywelyn, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin около 1256 г. в местности монтгомири анд пул, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1285 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 54 лет.
